shortPost: GoalOS turns AI work into proof: one support workflow improves, proof validates it, reputation compounds it. The buyer does not need crypto. Private data stays off-chain. Public proof becomes verifiable.
longPost: Proof Card 001 shows the simplest useful example of GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension: a customer support workflow improves from v1.0 to v1.1, a reviewer checks the evidence, a Proof Card makes the result understandable, and reputation compounds future work. This is not just an AI answer. It is an auditable improvement loop.
founderLine: A model can answer. An agent can act. A sovereign intelligence institution must prove.
safeBoundary: Illustrative public usage example until replaced by a live Evidence Docket. No investment, legal, tax, security, mainnet, or achieved-AGI claim.
